---
title: "TAL Exploratory Analysis"
author: "Phoebe Carpenter"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/pcarpent/OneDrive - California Department of Water Resources/my files/projects/algae sensor calibration data/coding/")
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r Data Import and Cleaning}
# Import Data and Add Column for Calibration Session

df <- read_csv("results_cleaned_sorted.csv") |>
  mutate(
    CalibDate = mdy(CalibDate),
    CalibSession = case_when(
      CalibDate >= mdy("10/01/2023") & CalibDate <= mdy("01/31/2024") ~ "2023",
      CalibDate >= mdy("10/01/2024") & CalibDate <= mdy("01/31/2025") ~ "2024",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
```

```{r Sonde Overview}

# Number of Unique Sondes/Sensors
df |> summarize(
    unique_sondes = n_distinct(OrigSondeID),
    unique_sensors = n_distinct(TALSensorSN)
  )

# Number of Entries Per Sensor
df |> count(TALSensorSN, sort = TRUE)

# Notes
df |> 
  filter(!is.na(Notes) & Notes != "") |>
  select(TALSensorSN, Notes)

```

```{r Session Overview}
# Identifying which sessions each sensor was calibrated during
sonde_sessions <- df |>
  distinct(TALSensorSN, CalibSession) |>
  group_by(TALSensorSN) |>
  summarize(n_CalibSessions = n(), Sessions = paste(sort(unique(CalibSession)), collapse = ", "))


# Adding Difference Columns
df <- df |>
  mutate(
    PreCalDiff = PreCalVal - ExpectVal,
    PostCalDiff = PostCalVal - ExpectVal
  )

# data table of first calibrations only
first_calibrations <- df %>%
  group_by(TALSensorSN) %>%
  summarize(FirstCalDate = min(CalibDate), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(df, by = "TALSensorSN") %>%
  filter(CalibDate == FirstCalDate)

non_first_calibrations <- df %>%
  anti_join(first_calibrations, by = c("TALSensorSN", "CalibDate"))

```

```{r}
# Identify sensors that were calibrated in both 2023 and 2024
both_sessions <- df |>
  filter(CalibSession %in% c("2023", "2024")) |>
  distinct(TALSensorSN, CalibSession) |>
  count(TALSensorSN) |>
  filter(n == 2) |> pull(TALSensorSN)

# Filter data for just those sensors
df_both_sensors <- df |>
  filter(TALSensorSN %in% both_sessions,
         CalibSession %in% c("2023", "2024"))

# Pivot longer for plotting
df_long <- df_both_sensors |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalVal, PostCalVal),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValue"
  )
```

```{r Calibration Accuracy}

# Checking whether values are within 15%
df <- df |>
  mutate(
    PreCal_Within15 = case_when(
      ExpectVal == 0 ~ PreCalVal == 0,
      TRUE ~ abs(PreCalVal - ExpectVal)/ExpectVal <= 0.15),
    PostCal_Within15 = case_when(
      ExpectVal == 0 ~ PostCalVal == 0,
      TRUE ~ abs(PostCalVal - ExpectVal)/ExpectVal <= 0.15
      )
)

# Summary by Parameter
df |> 
  group_by(Parameter) |>
  summarize(
    PreCal = mean(PreCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    PostCal = mean(PostCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PreCal, PostCal), names_to = "Calibration", values_to = "PercentWithin15") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Calibration, y = PercentWithin15, fill = Parameter)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Percent Within 15% by Parameter", y = "Percent", x = "") +
  theme_minimal() 

# Summary by Group Label
df |> 
  mutate(GroupLabel = paste(Parameter, Units, Standard, sep = " - ")) |>
  group_by(GroupLabel) |>
  summarize(
    PreCal = mean(PreCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    PostCal = mean(PostCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PreCal, PostCal), names_to = "Calibration", values_to = "PercentWithin15") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Calibration, y = PercentWithin15, fill = Calibration)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ GroupLabel) +
  labs(title = "Percent Within 15% of Expected Value", y = "Percent Within 15%", x = "") +
  theme_minimal()

# Summary by TAL Sensor
df |> 
  group_by(TALSensorSN) |>
  summarize(
    PreCal = mean(PreCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    PostCal = mean(PostCal_Within15, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PreCal, PostCal), names_to = "Calibration", values_to = "PercentWithin15") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Calibration, y = PercentWithin15, fill = TALSensorSN)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Percent Within 15% by TAL Sensor", y = "Percent", x = "") +
  theme_minimal() 


```

```{r }

# Individual sensor boxplots
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ TALSensorSN, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre and Post-Cal Values by Calibration Session for Individual Sensors",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


# combined data from all sensors
df_long <- df_long |>
  mutate(GroupLabel = paste(Parameter, Units, Standard, sep = " - "))
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ GroupLabel, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre and Post-Cal Values by Session and Calibration Conditions",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



# Difference From Expected Value
df_long_bothsessions_diff <- df_both_sensors |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalDiff, PostCalDiff),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValueDiff"
  ) |>
  mutate(GroupLabel = paste(Parameter, Units, Standard, sep = " - "))

ggplot(df_long_bothsessions_diff, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValueDiff, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ TALSensorSN, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre and Post-Cal Difference from Expected Value by Calibration Session for Individual Sensors",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(df_long_bothsessions_diff, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValueDiff, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ GroupLabel, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre and Post-Cal Difference from Expected Value by Session and Calibration Conditions",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



```

```{r Combined Boxplots}

# Combined boxplot
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Values by Calibration Session (Combined Sensors)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


ggplot(df_long, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Values by Session, Standard, and Units",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()






# With Difference Values
df_long_diff <- df_both_sensors |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalDiff, PostCalDiff),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValue"
  )
ggplot(df_long_diff, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Difference from Expected Value by Calibration Session (Combined Sensors)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


ggplot(df_long_diff, aes(x = CalibSession, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Difference from Expected Value by Session, Standard, and Units",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r First and Non-First Calibration (Factory vs Lab-Calibrated) Boxplots}

df_firstcalib_long <- first_calibrations |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalVal, PostCalVal),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValue"
  )
df_firstcalib_diff_long <- first_calibrations |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalDiff, PostCalDiff),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValueDiff"
  )
df_nonfirstcalib_long <- non_first_calibrations |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalVal, PostCalVal),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValue"
  )
df_nonfirstcalib_diff_long <- non_first_calibrations |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PreCalDiff, PostCalDiff),
    names_to = "CalibrationPhase",
    values_to = "CalValueDiff"
  )


# First Calibrations
ggplot(df_firstcalib_long, aes(x = CalibrationPhase, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Values (First Calibration/ Factory Only)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(df_firstcalib_diff_long, aes(x = CalibrationPhase, y = CalValueDiff, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Value Difference from Expected Value (First Calibration/ Factory Only)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


# Non-First Calibrations
ggplot(df_nonfirstcalib_long, aes(x = CalibrationPhase, y = CalValue, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +  # Let y-axis scale vary
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Values (Non-First Calibrations Only)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(df_nonfirstcalib_diff_long, aes(x = CalibrationPhase, y = CalValueDiff, fill = CalibrationPhase)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(Standard ~ Units, scales = "free_y") +  # Let y-axis scale vary
  labs(
    title = "Pre- and Post-Cal Value Difference from Expected Values (Non-First Calibrations Only)",
    x = "Calibration Session",
    y = "Calibration Value",
    fill = "Calibration Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()




# set 2023 and 2024 on same plot as in previous graphs

```



```{r Summary Statistics}

# Summary Stats for Pre and Post Cal Values
summary_by_group <- function(data) {
  data |> group_by(Standard, Parameter, Units, CalibSession) |>
    summarize(
      MeanPreCal = mean(PreCalVal, na.rm = TRUE),
      SDPreCal = sd(PreCalVal, na.rm = TRUE),
      MeanPostCal = mean(PostCalVal, na.rm = TRUE),
      SDPostCal = sd(PostCalVal, na.rm = TRUE),
      MeanPreCalDiff = mean(PreCalDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
      SDPreCalDiff = sd(PreCalDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
      MeanPostCalDiff = mean(PostCalDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
      SDPostCalDiff = sd(PostCalDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

summary_by_group(df)
summary_by_group(first_calibrations) # only includes first instance a sensor is calibrated (factory settings)
summary_by_group(non_first_calibrations) # all calibrations that were not the first for the sensor
summary_by_group(df_both_sensors) # only includes sondes calibrated in both 2023 and 2024

```




```{r Exploratory Graphs}


df_long <- df |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(PreCalVal, PostCalVal),
               names_to = "CalStage",
               values_to = "Value")




# Sensor Temp. vs. Calibration Values
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = SensorTemp, y = Value, color = CalStage)) + 
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Temperature vs. Calibration Value")

#ggplot(df_diff_long, aes(x = SensorTemp, y = Value, color = CalStage)) + 
#  geom_point() +
#  labs(title = "Temperature vs. Calibration Difference from Expected Value")





library(ggplot2)

# Scatterplot of PreCal and PostCal vs Expected Values with different colors
ggplot(df, aes(x = ExpectVal)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = PreCalVal, color = "Pre-Cal"), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(aes(y = PostCalVal, color = "Post-Cal"), alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Pre-Cal and Post-Cal Values vs Expected Values",
    x = "Expected Value",
    y = "Calibration Value"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-Cal" = "blue", "Post-Cal" = "green")) +  # Custom colors
  theme_minimal()


# Scatterplot of PreCal and PostCal vs Expected Values, faceted by Standard, Parameter, and Units
ggplot(df, aes(x = ExpectVal)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = PreCalVal, color = "Pre-Cal"), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(aes(y = PostCalVal, color = "Post-Cal"), alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Pre-Cal and Post-Cal Values vs Expected Values",
    x = "Expected Value",
    y = "Calibration Value"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-Cal" = "blue", "Post-Cal" = "green")) +  # Custom colors
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Standard + Parameter + Units, scales = "free")  # Facet by Standard, Parameter, and Units



```
